arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou hits back at Tottenham sack rumours ahead of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Tottenham head coach Ange Postecoglou hits back at rumours surrounding his future ahead of Sunday's Premier League meeting with Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Three players to miss Liverpool vs Tottenham as Reds look to wrap up Premier League title
arts.sum: Liverpool could win the Premier League on Sunday if they avoid defeat when Tottenham make the trip to Anfield and both sides have recently welcomed players back from injury
